_doc: Shared dispatch-gate test corpus. Both dispatch_gate.py and dispatch-gate.ts load this and must produce identical verdicts (parity test T3). See docs/dispatch-contract.md. expect fields: compliant, block, missing_has (substring that must appear in some missing[] entry), warnings_has (substring in some warnings[] entry), not_missing (substring that must NOT appear in missing[]).

cases.name: compliant_full
cases.prompt: You are implementing bead fblai-x1 in /Users/erato949/dev/optivai-claude-plugin (branch: main). Read scripts/open_brain.py and the spec at docs/dispatch-contract.md. Task: add a helper that counts tokens. Acceptance: the new pytest test passes and tsc is clean. Return a one-paragraph summary of the files changed and the test result.

cases.name: missing_termination
cases.prompt: You are working in scripts/foo.py. Please add a log parser and report your progress as you go. Read the existing helpers in scripts/ first.

cases.name: missing_output_contract
